items.title: Javon Small hits from way downtown
items.author: Yahoo Sports
items.body_excerpt: Javon Small hits from way downtown Yahoo Sports

items.title: The only two-way contract free agent for the Memphis Grizzlies is Rayan Rupert, a 2023 second round pick. Richie Saunders (ACL) could slide into that spot with 2025 second round picks Javon Small and Jahmai Mashack occupying the other two spots.
items.author: Law Murray 📘
items.body_excerpt: The only two-way contract free agent for the Memphis Grizzlies is Rayan Rupert, a 2023 second round pick. Richie Saunders (ACL) could slide into that spot with 2025 second round picks Javon Small and Jahmai Mashack occupying the other two spots.
